header:
# Cancellation & Refund Policy

**Go2Rinjani** — Legal Document  
Effective: 1 January 2026 | Last Updated: May 2026 | Version 2.0


This Cancellation & Refund Policy forms part of your agreement with Go2Rinjani and applies to all tour packages booked through our official channels. All cancellations must be submitted **in writing** via email or WhatsApp and are only considered effective upon written acknowledgment from Go2Rinjani.

sections.title: Section 1 — Cancellation by the Client
sections.content:
If a client cancels a confirmed booking, the following refund schedule applies based on the number of days prior to the scheduled tour departure date:

| Notice Period | Deposit (20%) | Remaining Balance | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 30+ days before departure | Non-refundable | Full refund (100%) | ✅ Most Favourable |
| 15–29 days before departure | Non-refundable | 50% refund | 🟡 Partial Refund |
| 7–14 days before departure | Non-refundable | 25% refund | 🟡 Partial Refund |
| Less than 7 days | Non-refundable | Non-refundable | ❌ No Refund |
| No-show (day of departure) | Non-refundable | Non-refundable | ❌ No Refund |

> **Note:** The 20% deposit is strictly non-refundable under all circumstances as it covers administrative, permit procurement, and pre-trip operational costs incurred by Go2Rinjani upon confirmation of booking.

### Additional Terms

- Refunds for the remaining balance (where applicable) will be processed within **14 business days** of the written cancellation acknowledgment
- Refunds will be returned via the original payment method. Bank transfer fees and currency conversion losses are borne by the client
- The effective cancellation date is the date on which Go2Rinjani **receives and acknowledges** the cancellation in writing — not the date the client sends the request

sections.title: Section 2 — Force Majeure & Cancellation by Go2Rinjani
sections.content:
Go2Rinjani may cancel or suspend a tour due to circumstances beyond our reasonable control ("Force Majeure"), including but not limited to:

- Elevated volcanic activity on Mount Rinjani (Alert Level II or above as declared by PVMBG)
- Official park closure ordered by TNGR or the Indonesian government
- Extreme weather conditions rendering the trek unsafe (as determined by our guide team and/or relevant meteorological authority)
- Natural disasters including earthquake, flood, or landslide
- Public health emergencies declared by national or regional authorities

> **In the event of cancellation by Go2Rinjani due to Force Majeure, the client is entitled to a full refund of all amounts paid, including the 20% deposit.** Refunds will be processed within 14 business days.

Alternatively, if the client prefers, Go2Rinjani will offer a **free reschedule** to a future available date of equivalent package value, valid for up to **12 months** from the original departure date.

sections.title: Section 3 — Tour Interruption (Early Departure)
sections.content:
If a client voluntarily chooses to leave the trek before its completion for any personal reason (including but not limited to injury caused by personal negligence, fatigue, or change of mind):

- No partial refund will be issued for unused tour days or services
- Go2Rinjani will make reasonable efforts to assist with safe descent and logistics, at cost to the client
- If early departure is due to a medical emergency, our team will coordinate emergency assistance; costs may be covered by personal travel insurance

sections.title: Section 4 — Rescheduling
sections.content:
- Clients may request **one (1) complimentary reschedule** if the request is made at least **14 days** before the original departure date
- Subsequent reschedule requests will incur an administrative fee of **IDR 250,000** per request
- Rescheduled dates are subject to availability and must be confirmed in writing by Go2Rinjani
- Rescheduling does not apply to the deposit, which remains non-refundable
- Price differences arising from peak season rescheduling will be charged to the client

sections.title: Section 5 — How to Submit a Cancellation
sections.content:
All cancellation requests must be submitted in writing through one of the following channels:

| Channel | Details |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp | [+62 819-1603-0378](https://wa.me/6281916030378) |
| Email | [go2rinjani@gmail.com](mailto:go2rinjani@gmail.com) |

**When submitting a cancellation, please include:**

- Your full name
- Booking reference number
- Scheduled departure date

A written acknowledgment from Go2Rinjani will be sent within **2 business days** of receiving your request. Cancellations are **not accepted** by phone or verbal communication.


*This Cancellation & Refund Policy was last reviewed in May 2026. Go2Rinjani reserves the right to amend this policy at any time. The version in effect at the time of booking shall apply.*

*Go2Rinjani — Explore Rinjani with Confidence.*
